query: SELECT ce.id, c.code, c.title, ce.enrolledAt FROM course_enrollments ce JOIN courses c ON ce.courseId = c.id WHERE ce.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Roddy Barksdale');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT ce.id, c.code, c.title, ce.enrolledAt FROM course_enrollments ce JOIN courses c ON ce.courseId = c.id WHERE ce.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Roddy Barksdale');
